name: China
summary: Day 77 of Hormuz blockade. **TRUMP-XI SUMMIT DAY 2 PRODUCED JOINT STATEMENT THAT IRAN 'CAN NEVER HAVE A NUCLEAR WEAPON' AND STRAIT OF HORMUZ 'MUST REMAIN OPEN'** (CONFIRMED multi-cluster — Times of Israel May 15 liveblog primary, CBS News, CNN Politics, China MFA official readout fmprc.gov.cn 2026-05-14, Trump Fox News interview). Both sides committed to a 'constructive China-U.S. relationship of strategic stability' framework guiding the next three years. **Xi additionally opposed 'the militarization of the Strait' and any effort to 'charge a toll' for its use, and said China is interested in purchasing more American oil to reduce dependence on the Strait** — operationally meaningful given >50% of Chinese energy transits Hormuz today. **The China MFA readout records that 'China values Iran's pledge not to pursue nuclear weapons while affirming its legitimate right to the peaceful use of nuclear energy'** — preserves Iran's right-to-civilian-program escape valve in the language. The HEU-via-China custodian door yesterday's brief opened is now soft-confirmed at rhetorical-alignment level; neither side announced an operational custodian framework, Xi has NOT publicly accepted any custodian role. Trump's Fox News follow-on assertions (CLAIMED — single source, NOT in joint statement text or MFA readout): Xi 'offered to broker peace with Iran,' 'won't supply Iran military equipment,' committed to buying soybeans/oil/LNG + 200 Boeing 737s — analyst skepticism widespread because China's existing soybean appetite is limited by cheap Brazilian alternatives (Reuters via People News Today). Xinhua and Global Times carried the joint statement on China's terms — Beijing letting the meeting + strategic-stability framework speak rather than commenting on Trump's Fox News claims. **PRIOR (May 14): Day 1 of summit — Trump publicly opened HEU-via-China custodian door; Xi opened with 'Thucydides Trap' framing + wants 2026 'landmark year.'** B1 OFAC Economic Fury extended (five Chinese teapot refineries prepared sanctions; China MOFCOM May 2 Blocking Rules invocation) carries forward; sanctions architecture remains 'explicit legal collision' even within joint-statement de-escalation tone. USD/CNY fix May 15 at 6.8415 vs Reuters estimate 6.7976 = weaker-than-expected fix, signaling Beijing tolerance for further yuan depreciation; Shanghai Composite 4,121.01 (-1.4% 1D); Hang Seng 25,897.05 (-1.9% 1D) — Hang Seng Trump-Xi 'disappointment' read (Foreign Policy: 'failed to secure major concessions'). Tasnim's Velayati 'we defeated you on the battlefield' jab carries forward — Iran framing Beijing summit as moment of Iranian leverage, not weakness. MATERIAL POLICY SIGNAL — contradicts pre-departure 'doesn't need Xi' line, substitutes China for Russia as proposed HEU custodian on Day 15 of 21 Russia-track window (US officials had reportedly ruled out Russia-as-custodian). Xi opened with 'Thucydides Trap' framing + 'partners rather than rivals' + wants 2026 'landmark year' — language designed to lower temperature. Xi has NOT publicly accepted any custodian role; framework remains stalled on substance (Iran's HEU return-clause demand + Trump's text-light approach unchanged) — but public custodian door now re-opened in different jurisdiction. **B5 IRAN'S AMBASSADOR TO CHINA PUBLICLY FRAMED BEIJING AS 'POLITICAL BALANCING' PARTNER** (Tasnim primary + CBS amplification CONFIRMED RHETORIC): 'long-term cooperation with China provides Iran with strategic diplomatic depth as it seeks an end to the war in the face of American pressure'; 'China is not merely an economic partner but part of Iran's political balancing against external threats'; 'China had paved the way for previous direct U.S.-Iran peace talks in Islamabad'; 'predicted Beijing could emerge as a key player in ongoing diplomacy.' Publicly-sanctioned Iranian state-media-side scaffolding for China-mediation arc — institutional ground deliberately laid in Iranian state media for exactly the HEU-via-China structure Trump opened. Diplomatic architecture pivot from Russia-track-stalled to China-track-opening is now visible from BOTH sides. Wang Yi's May 6 meeting with Araghchi already had Beijing publicly calling for end to hostilities and Hormuz reopening — China's institutional position is consistent with custodian-broker role. Xinhua/Global Times SILENT on China-HEU-custodian door-opening Trump statement at filing — China letting meeting itself speak rather than commenting. Chatham House 'Trump-Xi: can progress be made on Iran?' May 12 framing carries forward as most articulated European analytical anchor. **A11 IRAN FM ARAGHCHI MET MODI AT BRICS-FM TABLE MAY 14 IN DELHI** (CONFIRMED — Iran Embassy + Indian press) — Araghchi sat at BRICS table with Chinese FM Wang Yi via BRICS framework on the day Trump in Beijing managing Iran with Xi face-to-face. China-Iran direct alignment via BRICS architecture, simultaneously, with US bilateral diplomacy in same building. **B1 OFAC ECONOMIC FURY EXTENDED — Treasury signalled prepared secondary sanctions on FIVE CHINESE TEAPOT REFINERIES (Hengli Petrochemical Dalian, Shandong Jincheng, Hebei Xinhai, Shouguang Luqing, Shandong Shengxing); CHINA MOFCOM MAY 2 ISSUED PROHIBITION ORDER UNDER BLOCKING RULES** (carries forward CONFIRMED) — sanctions architecture shifting from 'secondary risk' to 'explicit legal collision.' USD/CNY 6.78 (-0.1% 1D, PBOC stability into summit) supports China-demand proxies; Shanghai Composite 4,213.09 (-0.7% 1D, +5.7% 1M); Hang Seng 26,436.29 (+0.2% 1D). MSCI EM +2.1% today = clean market vote on Trump-Xi 'partners not rivals' opening. PRIOR (May 13): Al Jazeera + NPR led with 'doesn't need Xi'; PBS NewsHour + CSIS framed both leaders as 'intent on keeping the Iran war from overshadowing the summit' = itself a DOWNGRADE from prior Chatham House 'can progress be made on Iran' framing. 12+ US CEOs (Tim Cook, Elon Musk) travelling = TRADE-AND-TARIFFS CENTRE OF GRAVITY, not Iran.** Trump arrives evening May 13; summit May 14-15. **B1 OFAC ECONOMIC FURY EXTENDED — Treasury formally signalled prepared secondary sanctions on FIVE CHINESE TEAPOT REFINERIES (Hengli Petrochemical Dalian, Shandong Jincheng, Hebei Xinhai, Shouguang Luqing, Shandong Shengxing); CHINA MOFCOM MAY 2 ISSUED PROHIBITION ORDER UNDER BLOCKING RULES — FIRST FORMAL CHINESE LEGAL COUNTERMEASURE TO US SANCTIONS — barring recognition, enforcement or compliance inside China with US sanctions on those five refineries** (CONFIRMED — Treasury primary + MOFCOM order text + Holland & Knight + Baker McKenzie corroboration). Sanctions architecture shifting from 'secondary risk' to 'explicit legal collision' — raises cost for any Chinese intermediary doing parallel US-and-Iran business. For Indian importers and remaining Iranian-oil-shadow-trade pathways, raises bar on PRC re-export financing — a non-obvious cascade through Indian PSU oil refining. Trump arrives Beijing day after the Blocking Rules invocation — Chinese have public legal ground prepared. **A11 IRAN FM ARAGHCHI ARRIVES NEW DELHI MAY 13 FOR BRICS FM MEETING MAY 14-15 — ARAGHCHI WILL SIT AT BRICS TABLE WITH CHINESE FM WHILE TRUMP IS IN BEIJING signalling China-Iran direct alignment** (CONFIRMED — Iran Embassy + Indian press). Xinhua/Global Times SILENT on OFAC tranche and the China Blocking Rules — Chinese state press letting the legal action speak rather than commenting on it. USD/CNY 6.79 (-0.1% 1D, PBOC stability into summit) supports China-demand proxies — Cu +2.5%, Ag +2.6% same session = traders LONG China-reflation, SHORT war-premium-supply (Al -2.4%). Shanghai Composite 4,237.83 (+0.6% 1D, +6.8% 1M); Hang Seng 26,304.78 (-0.2% 1D). **The summit Iran agenda has been publicly downgraded: Trump's 'doesn't need Xi' line + CSIS framing 'intent on keeping Iran from overshadowing summit' = expectation set on Iran progress materially LOWER than last weekend.** Tasnim's Velayati Trump-Xi summit-timed jab from May 9-11 still operative ('never imagine you will enter Beijing triumphantly'). Iran framing Beijing summit as moment of Iranian leverage, not weakness. PRIOR FRAMING: Russia-China energy lifeline; Iran is ~13% of China imports; >50% of Chinese energy transits Hormuz. — Trump departs May 13 afternoon for Beijing summit with Xi; Iran on agenda; Trump will press Xi on China's financial support for Iran and 'dual-use goods.' Per Bloomberg sources, a major Iran military decision is unlikely before departure. China previously gave Sec Def Hegseth assurance (April 16) NOT to send weapons to Iran. The pause window (May 13 afternoon → May 15-16) coincides exactly with Trump 1-week clock close (May 14), effectively MEANING the clock-close CANNOT trigger an immediate kinetic response** (CONFIRMED — Bloomberg primary, SCMP, PBS, Al Jazeera, CNBC). **B7 NEW OFAC SANCTIONS WAVE MAY 11-12 PRIMARILY TARGETS IRAN→CHINA OIL CHAIN: 12 entities (4 Hong Kong, 4 UAE, 1 Oman) + 3 individuals over IRGC Shaid Purja'fari oil HQ + Golden Globe Turkey-cover company facilitating Iranian oil sales to China; builds on July 2025 Golden Globe designations** (CONFIRMED — Treasury primary). Treasury Sec Bessent: continue using sanctions to deprive Iran funding; May 12 designations added Iranian nuclear research with military applications. Real financial action (secondary-sanctions risk for downstream Chinese and Gulf intermediaries). USD/CNY 6.79 (-0.1% 1D, -0.5% 1M, -1.7% 3M) — no current weaponization risk priced; if Trump-Xi summit fails on Iran/dual-use issue, USD/CNY could break 6.85+. Shanghai Composite 4,208.73 (-0.4% 1D, +5.3% 1M); Hang Seng 26,367.49 (-0.1% 1D). China May trade-data weakness contributes to Aluminum LME -2.3% counter-narrative (China property + global industrial moderation). **Xinhua/Global Times SILENT on OFAC sanctions tranche** (commercial reasons — China is primary buyer of Iranian oil with secondary-sanctions exposure). TASS/Pravda silent on WSJ UAE-Lavan story. Tasnim's Velayati (Iran Supreme Leader adviser) Trump-Xi summit-timed jab: 'Mr. Trump, never imagine that by taking advantage of Iran's calm, you will be able to enter Beijing triumphantly.' Iran framing Beijing summit as moment of Iranian leverage, not weakness. PRIOR FRAMING: Russia offered China energy lifeline (April 15) — pipeline + rail alternatives reduce but do not replace Hormuz exposure. Iran is ~13% of China imports; >50% of Chinese energy transits Hormuz.

recent_signals.headline: **TRUMP-XI SUMMIT DAY 2: JOINT STATEMENT ISSUED — IRAN 'CAN NEVER HAVE A NUCLEAR WEAPON' + STRAIT OF HORMUZ 'MUST REMAIN OPEN'** (CONFIRMED multi-cluster primary: Times of Israel May 15 liveblog, CBS News, CNN Politics, China MFA official readout fmprc.gov.cn 2026-05-14, Trump Fox News interview, Al Jazeera, Asian Mirror). Both sides committed to a 'constructive China-U.S. relationship of strategic stability' framework guiding the next three years. **Xi additionally opposed 'the militarization of the Strait' and any effort to 'charge a toll' for its use**, and said China is interested in purchasing more American oil to reduce dependence on the Strait — operationally meaningful given >50% of Chinese energy transits Hormuz today. **The China MFA readout records that 'China values Iran's pledge not to pursue nuclear weapons while affirming its legitimate right to the peaceful use of nuclear energy'** = Iran's right-to-civilian-program escape valve preserved in language. China-as-HEU-custodian door is now soft-confirmed at rhetorical-alignment level; neither side announced an operational custodian framework; Xi has NOT publicly accepted a custodian role. **Trump's Fox News follow-on assertions (CLAIMED — single source, NOT in joint statement or MFA readout)**: Xi 'offered to broker peace with Iran,' assured 'won't provide military equipment to Iran,' committed to buying US soybeans/oil/LNG + 200 Boeing 737s. Analyst skepticism: China's existing soybean appetite is limited by cheap Brazilian alternatives (Reuters via People News Today). **Xinhua and Global Times carried the joint statement on China's terms — Beijing letting the meeting + strategic-stability framework speak rather than commenting on Trump's Fox News follow-on claims.** USD/CNY fix May 15 at 6.8415 vs Reuters estimate 6.7976 = weaker-than-expected fix signaling Beijing tolerance for further yuan depreciation; Shanghai Composite 4,121.01 (-1.4% 1D); Hang Seng 25,897.05 (-1.9% 1D) — Hang Seng Trump-Xi disappointment read (Foreign Policy: 'failed to secure major concessions'). China April exports +14.1% y/y record $359.4bn, imports +25.3%; lending rates unchanged 11th straight month. The 'China-as-HEU-custodian framework formally accepted by Iran + US within 30 days (by 2026-06-13)' trigger remains 'watching' — joint statement is rhetorical alignment, NOT operational custodian framework.
sources: Times of Israel May 15 liveblog (joint statement primary)
China MFA official readout (fmprc.gov.cn 2026-05-14) — official primary
Al Jazeera Trump-Xi joint statement coverage
Trump Fox News interview (CLAIMED single source for Boeing/soybean/HEU follow-on)
Reuters via People News Today (analyst skepticism on soybeans)
recent_signals.verification: Joint statement text + China MFA readout = CONFIRMED multi-cluster; Iran 'can never have a nuclear weapon' + Hormuz 'must remain open' language = CONFIRMED in both readouts; strategic-stability framework = CONFIRMED; Trump Fox News follow-on (broker peace, no military equipment, soybeans, 200 Boeings) = CLAIMED only (single source, NOT in joint statement, MFA does not enumerate); MFA preservation of Iran 'peaceful nuclear energy' language = CONFIRMED (MFA readout primary); markets CONFIRMED tape.

recent_signals.headline: TRUMP-XI SUMMIT DAY 1 IN BEIJING — Xi opened with 'partners rather than rivals' / 'Thucydides Trap' framing + wants 2026 'landmark year' (CNBC + Al Jazeera + Times of Israel May 14 liveblog). **TRUMP PUBLICLY OPENED HEU-VIA-CHINA CUSTODIAN DOOR**: 'only Washington or Beijing can retrieve Iran's nuclear material if Tehran agrees to hand it over' (CONFIRMED RHETORIC — ToI primary). Material policy signal — contradicts pre-departure 'doesn't need Xi' line; substitutes China for Russia as proposed HEU custodian on Day 15 of 21 Russia-track window. Xi has NOT publicly accepted any custodian role; framework remains stalled on substance. **B5 IRAN'S AMBASSADOR TO CHINA PUBLICLY FRAMED BEIJING AS 'POLITICAL BALANCING' PARTNER** (Tasnim primary + CBS amplification, CONFIRMED RHETORIC): 'China is not merely an economic partner but part of Iran's political balancing against external threats'; 'China had paved the way for previous direct U.S.-Iran peace talks in Islamabad'; 'predicted Beijing could emerge as a key player in ongoing diplomacy.' Iran-state-media-side scaffolding for China-mediation arc — diplomatic architecture pivot from Russia-track-stalled to China-track-opening now visible from BOTH sides. **A11 ARAGHCHI MET MODI AT BRICS-FM TABLE IN DELHI MAY 14**, sitting alongside Chinese FM Wang Yi via BRICS framework — China-Iran direct alignment WHILE Trump in Beijing. Wang Yi's prior May 6 meeting with Araghchi already had Beijing publicly calling for end to hostilities and Hormuz reopening — institutional consistency with custodian-broker role. **Xinhua/Global Times SILENT on China-HEU-custodian door at filing — China letting meeting itself speak rather than commenting.** USD/CNY 6.78 (-0.1% 1D, PBOC stability into summit); Shanghai Composite 4,213.09 (-0.7% 1D, +5.7% 1M); Hang Seng 26,436.29 (+0.2% 1D); MSCI EM ETF +2.1% = clean market vote on Trump-Xi 'partners not rivals' opening. KOSPI +1.2% / Taiwan +0.9% participating in EM rally.
sources: Times of Israel May 14 liveblog (Trump HEU-via-China statement)
CNBC 'Xi asks Trump if U.S. and China can avoid Thucydides Trap'
Al Jazeera Trump-Xi summit live blog
Iran Embassy New Delhi + ANI + Tribune India (Araghchi visit)
Al Jazeera 'Why BRICS FM meeting in India matters'
recent_signals.verification: Trump HEU-via-China statement = CONFIRMED RHETORIC (ToI May 14 liveblog primary) — NOT POLICY, no operational announcement, Xi has not publicly accepted custodian role; Xi 'Thucydides Trap' opening = CONFIRMED RHETORIC (CNBC primary); Iran ambassador to China political-balancing scaffolding = CONFIRMED RHETORIC (Tasnim Iranian state primary + CBS amplification); Araghchi-Modi BRICS meeting = CONFIRMED ACTION (Iran Embassy primary + Indian press); markets = CONFIRMED tape (yfinance).

recent_signals.headline: TRUMP DEPARTED FOR BEIJING LATE MAY 12 DECLARING HE 'DOES NOT NEED XI'S HELP' ON IRAN — pre-summit posture hardened vs May 6-10 pulse-test; PBS+CSIS frame both leaders 'intent on keeping Iran war from overshadowing summit' = expectation DOWNGRADE; 12+ US CEOs (Cook, Musk) travelling = trade-and-tariffs centre of gravity. Summit May 14-15. **B1 OFAC ECONOMIC FURY EXTENDED — Treasury formally signalled prepared secondary sanctions on FIVE CHINESE TEAPOT REFINERIES (Hengli Petrochemical Dalian, Shandong Jincheng, Hebei Xinhai, Shouguang Luqing, Shandong Shengxing); CHINA MOFCOM MAY 2 ISSUED PROHIBITION ORDER UNDER BLOCKING RULES = FIRST FORMAL CHINESE LEGAL COUNTERMEASURE to US sanctions** (Holland & Knight + Baker McKenzie corroboration). Sanctions architecture shifting from 'secondary risk' to 'explicit legal collision.' **A11 IRAN FM ARAGHCHI ARRIVES NEW DELHI MAY 13 FOR BRICS FM MEETING MAY 14-15** — Araghchi sits at BRICS table with Chinese FM WHILE Trump is in Beijing = China-Iran direct alignment signal. Xinhua + Global Times SILENT on OFAC tranche + Blocking Rules — Chinese state press letting legal action speak rather than commenting. USD/CNY 6.79 (-0.1% 1D, PBOC stability into summit); Shanghai Composite 4,237.83 (+0.6% 1D, +6.8% 1M); Hang Seng 26,304.78 (-0.2% 1D). Cu +2.5%, Ag +2.6% same session = traders pricing 'trade-not-war' Trump-Xi summit reflation bid in industrial metals.
sources: Al Jazeera 'Trump downplays US-Iran differences as he heads to Beijing'
NPR 'Trump goes to China as Iran war smolders'
US Treasury OFAC press releases primary
Juan Cole 'Can China use its Huge Economy to Break US Iran Sanctions?'
Iran Embassy New Delhi primary (Araghchi BRICS visit)
recent_signals.verification: Trump Beijing departure + 'doesn't need Xi' = CONFIRMED ACTION + RHETORIC multi-source primary; OFAC five-refinery prepared sanctions + MOFCOM Blocking Rules order = CONFIRMED (Treasury + MOFCOM primary + legal analysts independent corroboration); Araghchi BRICS visit = CONFIRMED (Iran Embassy primary + Indian press); Chinese state press silence on OFAC + Blocking Rules = CONFIRMED ABSENCE (Xinhua / Global Times).

historical_summaries.summary: 4 signals. Chinese MFA spokesperson: attack and killing of Khamenei is 'grave violation of sovereignty | China provided missile spare parts, advanced radar systems, BeiDou-3 encrypted navigation for Iranian military, satellite intelligence suppo

10 signals. China is a NET BENEFICIARY of the crisis: (1) Manufacturing PMI 50 | China positioning as potential peace broker per CNN — Beijing moving from posturing to possible active mediation, which would be a major geo | China is net beneficiary of crisis (discounted Russian/Iranian crude)
